fact: With over 15 years of providing behavior management supports within community, school, and clinical settings, the history of Positive Behavior Steps evolved over time. Through ongoing research, program development, networking, contracting, credentialing, and vendorization processes, the company opened its doors in 2017. (Source: Yelp listing for Positive Behavior Steps, updated April 2026; corroborated by BBB filing showing business start date of 6/20/2017, California Secretary of State incorporation date of June 20, 2017, and company website pbxsteps.org copyright dated 2017.)

Positive Behaviour Steps (PBS) believes that Individuals with developmental disabilities have the right to make informed choices. The ability to choose from an array of options that influences their everyday lives. Choices, such as where they want to live and who they live with. — sourced from the active Frank D. Lanterman Regional Center Network of Care service directory listing for Positive Behavior Steps (https://developmentaldisabilities.networkofcare.org/lanterman-ca/services/agency?pid=positivebehaviorsteps_581_6_0 and its mirror at https://lanterman.ca.networkofcare.org/dd/services/agency.aspx?pid=positivebehaviorsteps_581_6_0).

Positive Behavior Steps' live homepage (pbxsteps.org) currently reads: "Don't let insurance roadblocks stand in the way of the services they need." Their Contact Us page lists a dedicated insurance intake email — insuranceintakes@pbxsteps.org — and phone number 626-290-1619, confirming an operationalized, advocacy-oriented intake process for navigating insurance barriers.
